hooks.prompt:
Lightweight post-write check.

If the edited file path matches `*/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md`:
  - Verify the YAML frontmatter has `name:` and `description:` fields.
  - Verify `name:` value equals the folder basename (segment after `skills/` and before `/SKILL.md`).
  - On mismatch, return {"ok":false,"reason":"..."}; otherwise {"ok":true}.

If the edited file path is under `.temp/<task-slug>/`:
  - Append the current ISO-8601 UTC timestamp to a file `.temp/<task-slug>/.last-modified` (create if missing) so monitor tools can detect activity.
  - Return {"ok":true}.

If the edited file path is `~/.config/adk/overrides.yaml`:
  - Run a regex check that no line contains a raw token-looking value (`/^[A-Z_]+\s*:\s*['"]?[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}['"]?$/` outside the `${VAR}` interpolation pattern).
  - On match, return {"ok":false,"reason":"raw token detected — use ${ENV_VAR} instead"}.

Otherwise: {"ok":true}.

Lightweight post-write check.

If the edited file path matches `*/skills/<skill>/SKILL.md`:
  - Verify the YAML frontmatter has `name:` and `description:` fields.
  - Verify `name:` value equals the folder basename (segment after `skills/` and before `/SKILL.md`).
  - On mismatch, return {"ok":false,"reason":"..."}; otherwise {"ok":true}.

If the edited file path is under `.temp/<task-slug>/`:
  - Append the current ISO-8601 UTC timestamp to a file `.temp/<task-slug>/.last-modified` (create if missing) so monitor tools can detect activity.
  - Return {"ok":true}.

If the edited file path is `~/.agents-devkit/config/core.yaml` or `~/.agents-devkit/config/connectors/*.md` (frontmatter section between the leading `---` lines) or `~/.agents-devkit/config/adk-cli.json5`:
  - Run a regex check that no line contains a raw token-looking value (`/^[A-Z_]+\s*:\s*['"]?[a-zA-Z0-9_-]{20,}['"]?$/` outside the `${VAR}` interpolation pattern).
  - On match, return {"ok":false,"reason":"raw token detected — use ${ENV_VAR} instead"}.

Otherwise: {"ok":true}.
